note: Topic -> visual concept seeds (style-agnostic). Active theme steers WHAT to depict; style/fusion steers HOW.

themes.name: The Power Cathedral
concepts: an endless hyperscale hall photographed as a single vanishing-point corridor, server rows dissolving toward a horizon like a cathedral nave
high-voltage transmission towers marching across dark farmland, their lines feeding a distant warehouse that glows like a furnace on the plain
a lone datacenter at dusk lit from within, a monolith on an empty landscape drawing power down from the sky
a river delta shot from directly overhead, branching channels of glowing molten metal feeding an immense dark basin — the arteries of poured capital
a silhouetted forest of construction cranes stretching unbroken to the horizon at dawn, booms overlapping like a leafless canopy under a burning sky

themes.name: Silicon at Scale
concepts: a single accelerator package held like a rare gemstone, its die catching light with the reverence of a jewel
a rack of GPUs viewed head-on as a glowing wall of fans, an altar of parallel compute
a swarm of identical chips arranged in a marching phalanx formation, suggesting relentless scale
a colossal staircase ascending into cold blue haze where each step is an order of magnitude taller than the last, a lone climber dwarfed at its base
nested concentric shells of light, each ten times the radius of the last, glowing like the growth rings of a felled giant sequoia

themes.name: The Cathedral of Precision
concepts: a cathedral nave reimagined as a cleanroom, bunny-suited figures small in the aisle, shafts of ultraviolet light falling where stained glass would be
an EUV source as a captive plasma droplet struck at the focal point of a cavernous mirror-lined hall, an artificial star caught at cathedral scale
an exploded view of a chiplet stack floating apart in mid-air, layers hovering like a disassembled artifact
a mirror-polished wafer catching a rainbow diffraction bloom, held in gloved hands, reflecting a machine hall into infinity
an interposer bridging two dies like a suspension bridge spanning a canyon between islands

themes.name: The Luminous Stack
concepts: a vertical stack of DRAM dies rising like a glass ziggurat, each layer lit from between
HBM cubes clustered tight around a processor like a honeycomb pressed against a queen cell
a cross-section of stacked memory rendered as a luminous apartment tower at night, every floor a data cell
a wall of memory chips receding into shelving that recalls an infinite library archive
bandwidth as a torrent of light pouring between a memory stack and a die across a narrow bridge

themes.name: The Braided Torrent
concepts: thousands of individual streams of light braiding and fusing into one blinding torrent that leaps the gap between two dark islands
a dense bundle of fiber-optic strands fanning out from a switch, each thread carrying a pinpoint of colored light
an overhead view of racks laced together by an impossibly neat cabling weave, a woven textile of copper and glass
a luminous suspension bridge of pure light spanning a black canyon, packets racing across faster than the eye can hold
bundled glowing axons of a nervous system scaled to a landscape, synaptic junctions flaring as signal floods between two masses

themes.name: The Heat Wall
concepts: immersion-cooled servers submerged in a still clear bath, bubbles rising through a glowing tank like an aquarium
coolant distribution manifolds photographed as a chrome pipe-organ, industrial plumbing rendered as sculpture
a miniature captive sun sealed inside a glass server cabinet, the pane warping and glowing orange at its edges, heat haze bending everything behind
a white-hot forged ingot plunged into black water, the violent instant of steam eruption, red meeting a wall it cannot pass
a split composition of molten heat and crystalline frost meeting at a single server tray, thermodynamics made visible

themes.name: The Long Burn
concepts: a lone glowing orb of tangled light suspended in a vast dark research hall, an intelligence being cultivated
a monolithic training cluster as a black obelisk humming with internal light, something summoned rather than built
a lone rocket on an impossibly sustained burn, its incandescent trail stretching clear across the frame and thinning into deep space
a cathedral-scale forge crucible glowing white, something enormous being cast slowly within over what feels like days, sparks drifting up
a long-exposure star-trail spiral wheeling around a single dark datacenter, the run captured as one continuous arc of light

themes.name: The Iridescent Skin
concepts: a colossal iridescent soap bubble enclosing a glowing datacenter, its surface swirling with oil-slick color, a fine needle drifting in from the frame edge
a house of cards built entirely from mirror-polished silicon wafers, tall and improbable, one card near the base visibly trembling
a rocket built from stacked server modules mid-launch, exhaust of cold vapor ascending against a clean sky
towering stacks of silicon wafers rising like skyscrapers in a financial-district skyline at golden hour
a gilded golden sculpture of a server rack whose gold leaf is peeling at one corner to reveal a hollow papery void

themes.name: The Frozen Cargo
concepts: a single glowing chip suspended mid-transit inside a block of clear ice or golden amber, frozen the instant before delivery
a massive iron portcullis slamming down across a lit shipping lane, a caravan of chips stranded and dimming on the wrong side
a great wall bisecting a vast circuit-board landscape, one half warm and illuminated, the other gone dark and cold to the horizon
two tectonic-plate landmasses of circuit-board texture grinding at a fault line, pressure building
a chess board where the pieces are lithography machines and wafers, a slow strategic standoff

themes.name: The Single Thread
concepts: a single taut silicon-bright thread spanning between two continental cliff edges across a dark void, one bead of light traveling its length
a precarious Jenga-like tower of stacked wafers bridging a chasm between two rock outcrops, one wafer pulled proud and about to give
a datacenter rising as a fortress-citadel on its own small island, ringed by dark still water, its light not reaching the mainland shore
tectonic plates drifting apart on a molten sea, each slab carrying a single self-contained glowing compute-city, the gaps widening
interlocking gears of wildly mismatched sizes laid across a relief globe, the whole system halted because one fingernail-sized gear is jammed

themes.name: Robotics & Humanoids
concepts: a Vitruvian-style technical plate of a humanoid robot's actuators and proportions
a quadruped robot mid-stride across an industrial floor
a fleet of identical humanoids on an assembly line, uncanny and ordered
a robot hand and a human hand reaching for the same tool

themes.name: Clouds & Ratings
concepts: a ranked podium/leaderboard of cloud providers rendered as data-halls
rows of rental GPU racks with meters ticking upward
a cloud-shaped datacenter metering out compute like rain
a quality seal/badge stamped onto a server hall

themes.name: RL & Benchmarks
concepts: two accelerators racing on a benchmark track toward a finish line
a training loop drawn as an ouroboros of tokens
a reward-hacking gremlin gaming a glowing scoreboard
trainer vs generator throughput as two reservoirs matched by a river
